name: Claude Fable 5
description: Claude Fable 5 is Anthropic's generally available Mythos-class model for long-horizon coding, autonomous knowledge work, and asynchronous agent workflows. It shares the same underlying model as [Claude Mythos 5](/anthropic/claude-mythos-5) but ships with safeguards for high-risk cyber, biology, and chemistry requests, positioning it as Anthropic's public frontier model above Claude Opus 4.8 for large codebases, multi-stage debugging, and end-to-end work that can run for hours or days with minimal human check-ins.

details.name: availability
details.value: Claude Fable 5 is Anthropic's released public counterpart to [Claude Mythos 5](/anthropic/claude-mythos-5). AI Stats now tracks launch coverage across Anthropic, Claude Platform on AWS, Amazon Bedrock, and Google Vertex AI, with release pricing, cache pricing, and the `anthropic/claude-fable-latest` alias synced to the June 9 rollout.

details.name: frontiercode_effort_note
details.value: Anthropic's Mythos-class FrontierCode (Diamond) compute-scaling chart reports 11.5% at low effort, 17.8% at medium, 24.0% at high, 29.3% at xHigh, and 30.9% at max. AI Stats mirrors those effort-level scores onto Claude Fable 5 because Fable 5 and Mythos 5 are the same underlying model with safeguards applied differently.
